symbols.name: notice mark, regulation in genearal

semantic_brief.brief: NMKREG01 is notice mark, regulation in genearal. It is used as a notice mark, regulation in genearal. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: red, white, black.

Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
